title: Add container-based agent execution for cross-platform kickoff

comments.author: noether--add-container-agent
comments.content: Plan: Implement container-based agent execution per DESIGN-CONTAINER-AGENTS.md. Phase 1 scope: 1) Embed Dockerfile + entrypoint in binary, 2) crosslink container build/start/ps/logs/stop/rm/shell subcommands, 3) Dynamic resource detection, 4) Update /kickoff and /check skills, 5) Container config in hook-config.json. Architecture: single task container hosts agent swarm, credentials-only auth mount, shared hub cache, hooks enforce policy inside container.

comments.author: noether--add-container-agent
comments.intervention_context: Waiting for human to push feature/add-container-based-agent-execution to origin

comments.author: noether--add-container-agent
comments.content: Delivered: crosslink container subcommand (build/start/ps/logs/stop/rm/kill/shell/snapshot), embedded Dockerfile + entrypoint, CLI wiring, design doc v3. PR #150 opened. All 146 tests pass, clippy and fmt clean.
